THAT’S
ME :]
25 years Frankfurt am Main +49 162 746 1323 frowerkmo@gmail.com

My background — product design, graphic design, social media and creative concept work. All of it shapes the open way I look at design.

Alongside my studies in Design & Mobility, I work intensively with modern digital design workflows. AI for image and 3D, vibe-coding and prototyping increasingly feed into one another. My goal is to use these possibilities deliberately in the design process: making ideas faster to see, test and understand — and turning them into product-ready, efficient design.
